title: False-positive problem in spatial CCI
biological_message: Spatial CCI needs orthogonal evidence beyond expression, database membership or proximity alone.
caveat: Schematic panel; source data records graphical elements.

title: TopoLink-CCI score formula
biological_message: The discovery score is a prior-weighted geometric mean of six diagnostic components.
caveat: Schematic formula uses editable text rather than math outlines.

title: Local contact model
biological_message: Local contact links candidate molecular axes to the actual cell-cell neighbor graph.
caveat: Schematic panel; source data records nodes and edges.

title: Validation gate map
biological_message: TopoLink-CCI reports candidates with controls inspired by established CCC methods.
caveat: Schematic mapping, not a claim of identical software reimplementation.

title: Evidence matrix
biological_message: Seven representative TopoLink-CCI axes have strong computational support.
caveat: Orange marks are axis-specific weak evidence layers, not artifact-risk calls.

title: Quantitative false-positive controls
biological_message: Representative axes pass multiple quantitative controls, not just the TopoLink-CCI score.
caveat: Bubble sizes use transformed metrics; raw values are in source data.

title: Whole-dataset score landscape
biological_message: TopoLink-CCI ranks 1,319,600 whole-dataset candidate axes and highlights validated discoveries.
caveat: Histogram bins are source data; highlighted lines mark seven representative axes.

title: Top interpretable axes
biological_message: High-scoring axes span vascular, immune, stromal, Notch and tumor-intrinsic biology.

title: VWF-SELP component decomposition
biological_message: The lead endothelial axis combines topology, expression and local contact support.

title: VWF-SELP rank sensitivity
biological_message: Component perturbations test whether the top axis is driven by one isolated term.

title: Expression specificity dotplot
biological_message: VWF-SELP interpretation is supported by endothelial marker specificity and contamination controls.
caveat: RNA expression specificity does not prove protein localization.

title: VWF-SELP spatial hotspots
biological_message: VWF-SELP hotspots localize to a subset of endothelial neighborhoods.
caveat: Dense background cells are rasterized to keep Illustrator files usable.

title: Hotspot neighborhood context
biological_message: Endothelial VWF-SELP hotspots can be interpreted through their neighboring cell ecology.

title: Pathway context
biological_message: VWF-SELP hotspots align with vascular identity and thromboinflammatory pathway panels.

title: Contour ecology context
biological_message: Vascular interaction axes can be interpreted in the broader contour and tissue-ecology context.

title: Cross-method consensus
biological_message: TopoLink-CCI discoveries are triangulated against independent method outputs.
caveat: Methods differ in score definitions; this panel shows support categories, not raw score equivalence.
